factory.desc: Function which should return an Object or a Promise resolving with an Object; For best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: Optional configuration for the upload process; You can override QUploader props in this Object (url, method, headers, formFields, fieldName, withCredentials, sendRaw); Props of these Object can also be Functions with the form of (file[s]) => value
returns.desc_cn: 上传过程的可选配置；您可以在此对象中覆盖 QUploader 的属性（url、method、headers、formFields、fieldName、withCredentials、sendRaw）；这些对象的属性也可以是形式为 (file[s]) => value 的函数。

factory.desc_cn: 应该返回一个对象或者一个解析为对象的 Promise 的函数；为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，不要内联定义。

url.desc: URL or path to the server which handles the upload. Takes String or factory function, which returns String. Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: URL or path to the server which handles the upload
returns.desc_cn: 处理上传的服务器的 URL 或路径

url.desc_cn: 处理上传的服务器的 URL 或路径。接受字符串或工厂函数，该函数返回字符串。在上传之前调用此函数；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域引用它，而不要内联定义它。

method.desc: HTTP method to use for upload; Takes String or factory function which returns a String; Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: HTTP method to use for upload
returns.desc_cn: 用于上传的 HTTP 方法

method.desc_cn: 用于上传的 HTTP 方法；接受字符串或返回字符串的工厂函数；该函数在上传之前被调用；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义。

field-name.desc: Field name for each file upload; This goes into the following header: 'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="__HERE__"; filename="somefile.png"; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: Field name for the current file upload
returns.desc_cn: 当前文件上传的字段名称

field-name.desc_cn: 每个文件上传的字段名称；这将放入以下标头中：'Content-Disposition: form-data; name="__HERE__"; filename="somefile.png"；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域引用它，而不要内联定义

headers.desc: Array or a factory function which returns an array; Array consists of objects with header definitions; Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: An array consisting of objects with header definitions
returns.desc_cn: 由头部定义组成的对象数组

headers.desc_cn: 数组或者一个返回数组的工厂函数；数组由包含头部定义的对象组成；在上传之前调用该函数；如果使用函数，为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义。

form-fields.desc: Array or a factory function which returns an array; Array consists of objects with additional fields definitions (used by Form to be uploaded); Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: An array consists of objects with additional fields definitions (used by Form to be uploaded)
returns.desc_cn: 一个由对象组成的数组，其中包含额外的字段定义（用于上传表单）。

form-fields.desc_cn: 数组或者一个返回数组的工厂函数；数组由带有额外字段定义的对象组成（用于表单上传）；在上传之前调用该函数；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义。

with-credentials.desc: Sets withCredentials to true on the XHR that manages the upload; Takes boolean or factory function for Boolean; Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: If true, withCredentials will be set to true on the XHR that manages the upload
returns.desc_cn: 如果设置为 true，则在管理上传的 XHR 上将 withCredentials 设置为 true

with-credentials.desc_cn: 在管理上传的 XHR 上将 withCredentials 设置为 true；接受布尔值或用于布尔值的工厂函数；该函数会在上传之前被调用；如果使用一个函数，为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，而不要内联定义。

send-raw.desc: Send raw files without wrapping into a Form(); Takes boolean or factory function for Boolean; Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: If true, raw files will get sent without wrapping into a Form()
returns.desc_cn: 如果为 true，则原始文件将在不包装到 Form() 中的情况下发送。

send-raw.desc_cn: 将未包装到 Form() 中的原始文件发送；接受布尔值或用于布尔值的工厂函数；在上传之前调用该函数；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域引用它，而不要内联定义。

batch.desc: Upload files in batch (in one XHR request); Takes boolean or factory function for Boolean; Function is called right before upload; If using a function then for best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

returns.desc: If true, files will be uploaded in a batch (in one XHR request)
returns.desc_cn: 如果设置为 true，则文件将批量上传（在一个 XHR 请求中）

batch.desc_cn: 批量上传文件（在一个 XHR 请求中）；接受布尔值或用于布尔值的工厂函数；该函数会在上传之前被调用；如果使用函数，则为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域引用它，而不要内联定义。

accept.desc: Comma separated list of unique file type specifiers. Maps to 'accept' attribute of native input type=file element
accept.desc_cn: 逗号分隔的唯一文件类型规范列表。映射到原生输入类型为 file 的元素的 'accept' 属性

capture.desc: Optionally, specify that a new file should be captured, and which device should be used to capture that new media of a type defined by the 'accept' prop. Maps to 'capture' attribute of native input type=file element
capture.desc_cn: 可选地，指定应捕获新文件，并指定用于捕获由 'accept' 属性定义的新媒体的设备。映射到原生 input type=file 元素的 'capture' 属性。

max-file-size.desc: Maximum size of individual file in bytes
max-file-size.desc_cn: 单个文件的最大大小（以字节为单位）

max-total-size.desc: Maximum size of all files combined in bytes
max-total-size.desc_cn: 所有文件组合的最大大小（以字节为单位）

max-files.desc: Maximum number of files to contain

filter.desc: Custom filter for added files; Only files that pass this filter will be added to the queue and uploaded; For best performance, reference it from your scope and do not define it inline

files.desc: Candidate files to be added to queue
files.desc_cn: 候选文件将被添加到队列中

returns.desc: Filtered files to be added to queue
returns.desc_cn: 筛选后的文件将被添加到队列中

filter.desc_cn: 自定义过滤器用于添加的文件；只有通过此过滤器的文件才会被添加到队列并上传；为了获得最佳性能，请从您的作用域中引用它，不要内联定义。

color.desc: Color name for component from the Quasar Color Palette
color.desc_cn: 来自 Quasar 颜色调色板的组件颜色名称

text-color.desc: Overrides text color (if needed); Color name from the Quasar Color Palette
text-color.desc_cn: 覆盖文本颜色（如果需要）；来�� Quasar 颜色调色板的颜色名称

dark.desc: Notify the component that the background is a dark color
dark.desc_cn: 通知组件背景颜色为深色

square.desc: Removes border-radius so borders are squared
square.desc_cn: 移除边框半径，使边框变为方形

flat.desc_cn: 应用 'flat' 设计（没有默认阴影）

bordered.desc: Applies a default border to the component

no-thumbnails.desc: Don't display thumbnails for image files
no-thumbnails.desc_cn: 不要为图像文件显示缩略图

disable.desc_cn: 将组件置于禁用模式中

readonly.desc_cn: 将组件设置为只读模式

header.desc: Slot for custom header; Scope is the QUploader instance itself
header.desc_cn: 自定义标题的插槽；作用域是 QUploader 实例本身

list.desc: Slot for custom list; Scope is the QUploader instance itself
list.desc_cn: 自定义列表的插槽；作用域是 QUploader 实例本身。

uploaded.desc: Emitted when file or batch of files is uploaded

info.desc: Object containing information about the event

xhr.desc: XMLHttpRequest that has been used to upload this batch of files
xhr.desc_cn: 已使用的 XMLHttpRequest 上传此批文件

uploaded.desc_cn: 当文件或一批文件被上传时触发

failed.desc: Emitted when file or batch of files has encountered error while uploading

info.desc: Object containing information about the event

xhr.desc: XMLHttpRequest that has been used to upload this batch of files
xhr.desc_cn: 已使用的 XMLHttpRequest 上传此批文件

failed.desc_cn: 上传文件或批量文件时遇到错误时触发的事件

uploading.desc: Emitted when file or batch of files started uploading

info.desc: Object containing information about the event

uploading.desc_cn: 当文件或一批文件开始上传时触发

factory-failed.desc: Emitted when factory function is supplied with a Promise which is rejected

err.desc: Error object which is the Promise rejection reason
err.desc_cn: 作为 Promise 的拒绝原因的错误对象

files.desc: Files which were to get uploaded

factory-failed.desc_cn: 当工厂函数提供的 Promise 被拒绝时触发

rejected.desc: Emitted after files are picked and some do not pass the validation props (accept, max-file-size, max-total-size, filter, etc)

rejectedEntries.desc: Array of { failedPropValidation: string, file: File } Objects for files that do not pass the validation
rejectedEntries.desc_cn: 不通过验证的文件的 { failedPropValidation: string, file: File } 对象数组

rejected.desc_cn: 在选择文件后，如果有些文件未通过验证属性（accept、max-file-size、max-total-size、filter 等）的检查，则会触发此事件。

added.desc: Emitted when files are added into the list

files.desc: Array of files that were added

added.desc_cn: 当文件被添加到列表中时触发

removed.desc: Emitted when files are removed from the list

files.desc: Array of files that were removed

removed.desc_cn: 当文件从列表中移除时触发

finish.desc: Finished working (regardless of success or fail)
finish.desc_cn: 工作完成（无论成功与否）

pickFiles.desc: Trigger the file picker dialog; The event must come from a user interaction event handler

evt.desc: JS event object of the original user interaction handler
evt.desc_cn: 原始用户交互处理程序的 JS 事件对象

pickFiles.desc_cn: 触发文件选择对话框；事件必须来自用户交互的事件处理程序。

addFiles.desc: Manually add files to the queue

files.desc: Must be an array of instances of JS File type
files.desc_cn: 必须是 JS 文件类型的实例数组

addFiles.desc_cn: 手动将文件添加到队列中

upload.desc: Start uploading (same as clicking the upload button)
upload.desc_cn: 开始上传（与点击上传按钮相同）

abort.desc: Abort upload of all files (same as clicking the abort button)
abort.desc_cn: 中止上传所有文件（与点击中止按钮相同）

reset.desc: Resets uploader to default; Empties queue, aborts current uploads
reset.desc_cn: 重置上传器为默认状态；清空队列，中止当前的上传操作。

removeUploadedFiles.desc: Removes already uploaded files from the list
removeUploadedFiles.desc_cn: 从列表中删除已上传的文件

removeQueuedFiles.desc: Remove files that are waiting for upload to start (same as clicking the left clear button)
removeQueuedFiles.desc_cn: 移除等待上传开始的文件（与点击左侧清除按钮相同）

removeFile.desc: Remove specified file from the queue
removeFile.desc_cn: 从队列中删除指定的文件

updateFileStatus.desc: Update the status of a file

uploadedSize.desc: The number of uploaded bytes of the file; Is required explicitly only when status is NOT 'uploaded'
uploadedSize.desc_cn: 文件上传的字节数；仅在状态不为 'uploaded' 时需要显式指定

isAlive.desc: Is the component alive (activated but not unmounted); Useful to determine if you still need to compute anything going further

returns.desc: If true, the current component is still activated and mounted
returns.desc_cn: 如果为 true，则当前组件仍处于激活和挂载状态

isAlive.desc_cn: 组件是否处于活动状态（已激活但未卸载）；用于确定在进一步计算之前是否仍然需要进行任何操作。

queuedFiles.desc: List of files that are waiting to be uploaded

uploadedFiles.desc: List of files that have been uploaded

uploadedSize.desc: Size of all uploaded files in bytes
uploadedSize.desc_cn: 所有上传文件的大小（以字节为单位）

uploadSizeLabel.desc: Label for the size total of all files

uploadProgressLabel.desc_cn: 上传进度的标签（以%表示）

canAddFiles.desc: Whether new files can be added to the list
canAddFiles.desc_cn: 是否可以向列表中添加新文件

canUpload.desc: Whether the files can be uploaded

isBusy.desc: The component state is set as busy; User should not be able to interact with the component
isBusy.desc_cn: 组件状态设置为繁忙；用户不应该能够与组件进行交互
